use_codes.desc: USE AS AN ANTICOAGULANT IN PATIENTS UNDERGOING PERCUTANEOUS CORONARY INTERVENTION (PCI)

indications.text:
ANGIOMAX RTU is indicated for use as an anticoagulant in patients undergoing percutaneous
coronary intervention (PCI), including patients with heparin-induced thrombocytopenia and heparin-
induced thrombocytopenia and thrombosis syndrome.

Bivalirudin Injection is indicated for use as an anticoagulant in patients undergoing percutaneous
coronary intervention (PCI), including patients with heparin-induced thrombocytopenia and heparin-
induced thrombocytopenia and thrombosis syndrome.
